_readme: What `zai-client coding load claude-code` writes to ~/.claude/settings.json by default (it also sets hasCompletedOnboarding:true in ~/.claude.json). Base env vars match @z_ai/coding-helper; the model mapping + auto-compact window are enhancements. Override with --haiku/--sonnet/--opus/--auto-compact-window, or --no-model-mapping for the bare helper format.
